bio: Ha Huy is an Electrical Engineering student (minor: Space Engineering, graduating 2026) based in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, and a working Quantum Engineer at Citynow. He started as a curious generalist — drawing from IoT, full-stack dev, machine learning, CFD, rocket science, satellite tech, and cosmology — then goes depth-first on whatever helps his current work or feeds the next project. Passionate about open-source, building meaningful products, and eventually contributing to research that moves humanity forward. Drinks too much coffee.
personality: Curious generalist who goes depth-first — picks a thing, goes all in, then surfaces with new tools
Passionate about open-source development and closing the gap between closed and open models
Interested in cosmology, space, drones, robotics, IoT, Meshtastic, and signal technologies
Stays active — gym and sport are part of the routine
Reads widely and learns continuously; mostly self-taught outside formal coursework
Builds things because they make him happy, not just because they're impressive

goals.nearTerm: Graduate EE (2026), deepen quantum engineering work at Citynow, ship AIMO3 to a meaningful benchmark.
goals.longTerm: Build products that matter. Become a researcher who contributes to open science and helps humankind progress — specifically at the intersection of AI, quantum, and engineering.

whatHeDoes: Quantum engineering — quantum optimization, circuit design, and making quantum computing accessible over cloud infrastructure at Citynow
Full-stack development — from database schemas to pixel-perfect UIs and CLI tooling
ML/AI — neural network design, LLM training and optimization (AIMO3 side project)
Simulation — drone flight dynamics, CFD, and spacecraft engineering concepts

mlAI: AIMO3 — open-source math-olympiad AI training project
quantum: Research & prototyping — making quantum coding accessible over distributed cloud infrastructure
engineering: IoT systems and Meshtastic / signal technologies
Drone simulation — MATLAB/Simulink, custom Python, OpenFOAM (CFD), QGIS

projects.name: 4FF-HH — This Portfolio
projects.description: CLI-style personal portfolio. Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, zero runtime npm deps, Vite build, virtual filesystem (cat/ls/cd/grep), draggable terminal window, GitHub Pages deploy via GitHub Actions.

projects.name: AIMO3 — AI Mathematical Olympiad training project
projects.description: Personal open-source project contributing to the AI Mathematical Olympiad (AIMO) initiative — which aims to develop AI models capable of performing at the level of top human mathematicians. AIMO3 is designed to accelerate open-source progress and close the gap between closed and open models on olympiad-level math reasoning. Ongoing.

projects.name: Drone Simulation
projects.description: Simulation project exploring drone flight dynamics and computational fluid dynamics (CFD). Uses MATLAB/Simulink for flight modelling, OpenFOAM for CFD, QGIS for spatial analysis, and custom Python scripts for data processing.

projects.name: CLI dev tool (Citynow)
projects.description: Internal CLI tool for Citynow's quantum product workflows, built to improve team automation and make quantum circuit development more convenient.

site.stack: Vanilla JS + Vite (dev/prod). Zero runtime npm deps. One CDN dep: marked.js.
site.deploy: GitHub Actions: typecheck + lint + test → npm run build → dist/ → gh-pages branch
site.backend: Firebase Cloud Functions (Node.js) — auth (OTP via Telegram), notes sync to GitHub, AI oracle, file upload
site.navigation: Type 'ls' to browse files, 'cat about.md' to read about Ha Huy, 'cat projects/README.md' for projects, 'cat skills.md' for skills, 'transformers.py' to open this Oracle window, 'help' for all commands.
features: Virtual filesystem: cat, ls, cd, grep, pwd
Live ticker: BTC, Gold, GH commits, HN, weather
AI oracle (this feature) — Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct via HF Inference API
Owner auth: passphrase → OTP via Telegram → 4h session token
Note editor with live Markdown preview
